title: Refresh release supply-chain evidence

sources.reason: Strict smoke found the committed SBOM differs from current repository evidence.
Strict smoke found the committed provenance differs from current repository evidence.
Regenerate digest evidence alongside SBOM and provenance.

riskAssessment.reason: Release evidence must match the exact merged source and current locked dependency state.

executionDecision.reason: The failing strict smoke evidence identifies a bounded generated-artifact refresh.

preReviewWarnings: Verify regenerated artifacts pass all supply-chain checks and strict smoke.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: SBOM, provenance, and release digests pass their repository-state checks.
Generated evidence records the current exact source commit and release tag.
Strict smoke passes after the refreshed evidence is merged.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The first strict smoke run failed because committed supply-chain evidence was stale relative to the merged repository.
constraints: Keep exact SHA and release gates unchanged.
intent.rationale: Regenerate all related evidence together so repository checks and release assets agree.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized fully automatic execution of the remediation loop.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
